name: hexmaker-plugin
description: A plugin to power hex crawl worldbuilding and running.

scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json
scripts.test: tsx --tsconfig ./tsconfig.test.json --import ./tests/register.mjs --test tests/frontmatter.test.ts tests/hexEditorModal.test.ts tests/randomTable.test.ts tests/sections.test.ts tests/utils.test.ts tests/workflow.test.ts
scripts.test:watch: tsx --tsconfig ./tsconfig.test.json --import ./tests/register.mjs --test --watch tests/frontmatter.test.ts tests/hexEditorModal.test.ts tests/randomTable.test.ts tests/sections.test.ts tests/utils.test.ts tests/workflow.test.ts

author: Mark B
